languages.text: "Вымаливать облегчение участи, возложенной на них с рождения! Может, стоит поставить им в пример сестер Ордена Доблестного Сердца? Те не дозволяют даже притупить боль при врачевании — каково бы ни…" {n}Арджента осекается, словно устыдившись собственной суровости.{/n} "Впрочем… сравнение несправедливо к простым работягам. Быть может, им и правда пригодится помощь."

traits.locale_text: "Вымаливать облегчение участи, возложенной на них с рождения! Может, стоит поставить им в пример сестер Ордена Доблестного Сердца? Те не дозволяют даже притупить боль при врачевании — каково бы ни…{n}Арджента осекается, словно устыдившись собственной суровости.{/n} "Впрочем… сравнение несправедливо к простым работягам. Быть может, им и правда пригодится помощь."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: [драфт] "Вымаливать облегчение участи, возложенной на них с рождения! Может, стоит поставить им в пример сестёр Ордена Доблестного Сердца? Те не дозволяют даже притупить боль при врачевании — каково бы ни…{n}Арджента осекается, словно устыдившись собственной суровости.{/n} Впрочем… сравнение несправедливо к простым работягам. Быть может, им и правда пригодится помощь."

languages.text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."
languages.original_text: "Вымаливать облегчение участи, возложенной на них с рождения! Может, стоит поставить им в пример сестер Ордена Доблестного Сердца? Те не дозволяют даже притупить боль при врачевании — каково бы ни…" {n}Арджента осекается, словно устыдившись собственной суровости.{/n} "Впрочем… сравнение несправедливо к простым работягам. Быть может, им и правда пригодится помощь."

traits.locale_text: "To beg for respite from the burden placed upon them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not permit even the dulling of pain during the healing of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

"To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

languages.text: "Um einen Aufschub ihrer angeborenen Bestimmung zu erbitten? Vielleicht sollten wir die Schwestern des Ordens des Tapferen Herzens als Beispiel hochhalten. Sie erlauben keine Schmerzmittel während der Behandlung ihrer Wunden, egal, wie schwer sie auch sein mögen ..." {n}Argenta hält inne, als würde sie sich ihrer deutlichen Worte schämen.{/n} "Allerdings ... ist dieser Vergleich für einfache Arbeiter ungerecht. Vielleicht würden sie tatsächlich von etwas Hilfe profitieren."
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

traits.locale_text: "Um einen Aufschub ihrer angeborenen Bestimmung zu erbitten? Vielleicht sollten wir die Schwestern des Ordens des Tapferen Herzens als Beispiel hochhalten. Sie erlauben keine Schmerzmittel während der Behandlung ihrer Wunden, egal, wie schwer sie auch sein mögen ..." {n}Argenta hält inne, als würde sie sich ihrer deutlichen Worte schämen.{/n} "Allerdings ... ist dieser Vergleich für einfache Arbeiter ungerecht. Vielleicht würden sie tatsächlich von etwas Hilfe profitieren."

languages.text: « Ils supplient qu'on allège un fardeau qui leur a été assigné depuis la naissance ? Nous devrions peut-être leur montrer l'exemple des sœurs de l'ordre du Cœur Valeureux. Lorsque l'on traite leurs blessures, aussi graves soient-elles, elles ne permettent jamais qu'on atténue leurs souffrances. » {n}Argenta s'interrompt, comme si sa sévérité lui faisait honte.{/n} « Cependant... La comparaison est injuste pour des travailleurs ordinaires. Peut-être pourraient-ils réellement bénéficier de notre aide. »
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

traits.locale_text: « Ils supplient qu'on allège un fardeau qui leur a été assigné depuis la naissance ? Nous devrions peut-être leur montrer l'exemple des sœurs de l'ordre du Cœur Valeureux. Lorsque l'on traite leurs blessures, aussi graves soient-elles, elles ne permettent jamais qu'on atténue leurs souffrances. » {n}Argenta s'interrompt, comme si sa sévérité lui faisait honte.{/n} « Cependant... La comparaison est injuste pour des travailleurs ordinaires. Peut-être pourraient-ils réellement bénéficier de notre aide. »

languages.text: “乞求解脱，逃脱他们出生以来既定的命运？或许我们该以无畏之心修会的姐妹们为楷模。她们在接受治疗时，无论伤势何等惨烈，都绝不允许对疼痛进行缓解……”{n}阿洁塔突然停住，仿佛为自己过于严厉的口吻感到羞愧。{/n}“然而……如此比较，对那些普通劳工未免太不公平。或许，他们真的需要一些帮助。”
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

traits.locale_text: “乞求解脱，逃脱他们出生以来既定的命运？或许我们该以无畏之心修会的姐妹们为楷模。她们在接受治疗时，无论伤势何等惨烈，都绝不允许对疼痛进行缓解……”{n}阿洁塔突然停住，仿佛为自己过于严厉的口吻感到羞愧。{/n}“然而……如此比较，对那些普通劳工未免太不公平。或许，他们真的需要一些帮助。”

languages.text: «¿Suplican alivio con respecto al destino que les fue asignado al nacer? Tal vez deberían seguir el ejemplo de las hermanas de la Orden del Corazón Valeroso. Ni siquiera permiten que se alivie su dolor cuando se tratan sus heridas, por graves que...». {n}Argenta se detiene, como si su propia severidad le diera vergüenza.{/n} «Pero... esa comparación es injusta para trabajadores normales. Tal vez sí les convenga recibir ayuda».
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

traits.locale_text: «¿Suplican alivio con respecto al destino que les fue asignado al nacer? Tal vez deberían seguir el ejemplo de las hermanas de la Orden del Corazón Valeroso. Ni siquiera permiten que se alivie su dolor cuando se tratan sus heridas, por graves que...». {n}Argenta se detiene, como si su propia severidad le diera vergüenza.{/n} «Pero... esa comparación es injusta para trabajadores normales. Tal vez sí les convenga recibir ayuda».

languages.text: 「生まれながらに背負わされた運命からの猶予を乞うですって？いっそ、勇猛なる心臓教団の修道女たちを範とすべきでしょう。彼女たちは、どれほど深手であろうと、治療の際に痛みを鈍らせることすら許しません…」{n}アルジェンタは、自らの厳しさを恥じるかのように口をつぐむ。{/n}「…とはいえ、その比較は、ただの労働者たちには酷というもの。彼らには本当に、いくらかの助けが必要なのかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."

traits.locale_text: 「生まれながらに背負わされた運命からの猶予を乞うですって？いっそ、勇猛なる心臓教団の修道女たちを範とすべきでしょう。彼女たちは、どれほど深手であろうと、治療の際に痛みを鈍らせることすら許しません…」{n}アルジェンタは、自らの厳しさを恥じるかのように口をつぐむ。{/n}「…とはいえ、その比較は、ただの労働者たちには酷というもの。彼らには本当に、いくらかの助けが必要なのかもしれません。」

languages.text: "Doğumlarından beri kendilerine bahşedilen kaderden biraz olsun uzaklaşmak için yalvarmak mı? Belki de Yiğit Yürek Tarikatı'nın kardeşlerini örnek göstermeliyiz. Ne kadar acı verici olursa olsun, yaralarının tedavisi sırasında acının dindirilmesine bile izin vermezler..." {n}Argenta, sanki kendi sertliğinden utanmış gibi aniden duraksıyor.{/n} "Yine de... Bu karşılaştırma, sıradan işçilere haksızlık olur. Belki de gerçekten yardım alabilirler."
languages.original_text: "To beg for respite from the fate chosen for them since birth? Perhaps we should hold up the sisters of the Order of the Valorous Heart as an example. They do not even permit the dulling of pain during treatment of their wounds, no matter how grievous..." {n}Argenta stops short, as if shamed by her own severity.{/n} "Yet... that comparison is unfair to common labourers. Perhaps they truly would benefit from some aid."
